metadata.packName: Synthetic KQL Samples for Banking and Finance E5 Scenarios
metadata.purpose: Provide synthetic KQL-style hunting and reporting examples for Purview, Defender XDR, endpoint DLP, AI, Power BI, and insider-risk-style banking/finance demo scenarios.
metadata.importantNote: These queries are schema-agnostic samples. Codex must adapt table names and field names to the target environment, such as Advanced Hunting, Microsoft Purview exports, OfficeActivity, UnifiedAuditLog, Log Analytics, ADX, or custom ingestion tables.

adaptationGuidance: Replace placeholder table names with the actual target tables.
Normalize field names before joining across workloads.
Use ScenarioId or CorrelationId if synthetic telemetry generation includes those fields.
If using Microsoft 365 unified audit logs, map Operation to workload-specific event names.
If using Defender Advanced Hunting, split identity, device, cloud app, and email events into their native tables.

queries.title: External Sharing of Regulated Financial Data
queries.businessQuestion: Which regulated financial files were shared or emailed externally?
queries.query:
let regulatedLabels = dynamic(['Highly Confidential - Regulated Financial Data','Highly Confidential']);
PurviewDlpEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Operation in ('FileShared','ExternalEmailSent','DLPPolicyMatch')
| where SensitivityLabel in (regulatedLabels) or FileName has_any ('KYC','AML','SAR','Loan','Credit','Treasury','Customer')
| summarize FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated), Operations=make_set(Operation), Files=make_set(FileName), Recipients=make_set(Recipient), Domains=make_set(TargetDomain) by UserPrincipalName, ScenarioId
| extend Severity = iff(array_length(Domains) > 0, 'High', 'Medium')
| order by LastSeen desc
queries.expectedUse: Detect outbound sharing or email involving regulated financial documents.

queries.title: Label Downgrade Followed by External Email
queries.businessQuestion: Did a user downgrade a sensitive file label before emailing it broadly or externally?
queries.query:
let labelChanges = SensitivityLabelEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Operation in ('SensitivityLabelChanged','LabelDowngrade')
| project LabelTime=TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, FileName, OldLabel, NewLabel, ScenarioId, CorrelationId;
let sends = M365Activity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Operation in ('EmailSent','ExternalEmailSent','FileShared')
| project SendTime=TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, FileName, Recipient, TargetDomain, Operation, CorrelationId;
labelChanges
| join kind=innerunique sends on UserPrincipalName, FileName
| where SendTime between (LabelTime .. LabelTime + 2h)
| project LabelTime, SendTime, UserPrincipalName, FileName, OldLabel, NewLabel, Operation, Recipient, TargetDomain, ScenarioId
| order by SendTime desc
queries.expectedUse: Correlate suspicious label changes with subsequent sharing activity.

queries.title: External AI Usage with Sensitive Banking Patterns
queries.businessQuestion: Which users pasted or uploaded regulated banking data into unmanaged AI apps?
queries.query:
DefenderCloudAppEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Operation in ('AIAppInteraction','UnmanagedAppUpload')
| where PromptText has_any ('CUST-BNK','ACCT-FIC','AML-CASE','SAR-DRAFT','KYC-FIC','LOAN-FIC') or FileName has_any ('AML','KYC','SAR','Customer','Treasury')
| extend SensitivePatternCount = countof(PromptText, 'CUST-BNK') + countof(PromptText, 'ACCT-FIC') + countof(PromptText, 'AML-CASE') + countof(PromptText, 'SAR-DRAFT')
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, AppName, Operation, FileName, SensitivePatternCount, RiskScore, ScenarioId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
queries.expectedUse: Identify Shadow AI or unmanaged AI usage involving sensitive-looking banking data.

queries.title: Copilot References Sensitive HR or Banking Files
queries.businessQuestion: Which Copilot interactions referenced sensitive source files?
queries.query:
CopilotInteractionEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Operation == 'CopilotInteraction'
| mv-expand SourceFile = SourceFiles
| extend SourceFileName = tostring(SourceFile.FileName), SourceLabel = tostring(SourceFile.SensitivityLabel)
| where SourceLabel has_any ('Highly Confidential','HR Restricted','Regulated Financial Data','Legal Privileged') or SourceFileName has_any ('Compensation','KYC','AML','Board','Acquisition','Legal')
| summarize SourceFiles=make_set(SourceFileName), Labels=make_set(SourceLabel), PromptSamples=make_set(substring(PromptText,0,120)) by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), ScenarioId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
queries.expectedUse: Support DSPM for AI and Copilot source exposure review.

queries.title: Endpoint Print or Network Copy of Sensitive Files
queries.businessQuestion: Which users printed or copied sensitive banking files to network shares or USB?
queries.query:
EndpointDlpEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Operation in ('FilePrinted','FileCopiedToNetworkShare','FileCopiedToUSB','EndpointDLPPolicyMatch')
| where SensitivityLabel has_any ('Highly Confidential','Regulated Financial Data') or FileName has_any ('Treasury','SAR','KYC','AML','Audit','Evidence')
| summarize Operations=make_set(Operation), Files=make_set(FileName), Devices=make_set(DeviceId), FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated), EventCount=count() by UserPrincipalName, ScenarioId
| extend Severity = case(EventCount >= 5, 'Critical', array_length(Operations) >= 2, 'High', 'Medium')
| order by LastSeen desc
queries.expectedUse: Detect endpoint movement of regulated financial or investigation files.

queries.title: Risky Sign-In Followed by Sensitive File Download
queries.businessQuestion: Did risky sign-ins precede sensitive file downloads?
queries.query:
let riskySignIns = IdentitySignInEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Operation in ('RiskySignIn','ConditionalAccessTriggered')
| project SignInTime=TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, RiskDetail, Location, DeviceId, ScenarioId;
let downloads = M365Activity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Operation == 'FileDownloaded'
| where SensitivityLabel has_any ('Highly Confidential','Regulated Financial Data') or FileName has_any ('KYC','AML','SAR','Treasury','Audit')
| project DownloadTime=TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, FileName, SensitivityLabel, SiteUrl, ScenarioId;
riskySignIns
| join kind=inner downloads on UserPrincipalName
| where DownloadTime between (SignInTime .. SignInTime + 4h)
| project SignInTime, DownloadTime, UserPrincipalName, RiskDetail, Location, DeviceId, FileName, SensitivityLabel, SiteUrl, ScenarioId
| order by DownloadTime desc
queries.expectedUse: Correlate identity risk with sensitive data access.

queries.title: Guest Access to Sensitive Teams or SharePoint Content
queries.businessQuestion: Were guests added to collaboration spaces containing sensitive banking files?
queries.query:
let guestEvents = M365Activity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Operation == 'GuestUserAdded'
| project GuestAddTime=TimeGenerated, TeamOrSiteId, UserPrincipalName, GuestUser=TargetUser, ScenarioId;
let sensitiveFileEvents = M365Activity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Operation in ('FileAccessed','TeamsFileShared','FileShared')
| where SensitivityLabel has_any ('Confidential','Highly Confidential','Regulated Financial Data','Legal Privileged') or FileName has_any ('Risk','KYC','AML','Legal','Committee','Due_Diligence')
| project FileEventTime=TimeGenerated, TeamOrSiteId, FileName, SensitivityLabel, Actor=UserPrincipalName, ScenarioId;
guestEvents
| join kind=inner sensitiveFileEvents on TeamOrSiteId
| where FileEventTime between (GuestAddTime .. GuestAddTime + 7d)
| summarize SensitiveFiles=make_set(FileName), Labels=make_set(SensitivityLabel), Actors=make_set(Actor) by GuestAddTime, UserPrincipalName, GuestUser, TeamOrSiteId, ScenarioId
| order by GuestAddTime desc

queries.title: Role Change Followed by Mass Download
queries.businessQuestion: Did a user download many sensitive files after an HR role-change signal?
queries.query:
let hrSignals = InsiderRiskSignals_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where SignalType == 'HRSignal'
| project HRSignalTime=TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, HRSignalType, ScenarioId;
let downloads = M365Activity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Operation == 'FileDownloaded'
| where SensitivityLabel has_any ('Confidential','Highly Confidential','Regulated Financial Data','Legal Privileged','HR Restricted')
| summarize DownloadCount=count(), Files=make_set(FileName), FirstDownload=min(TimeGenerated), LastDownload=max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), ScenarioId;
hrSignals
| join kind=inner downloads on UserPrincipalName
| where FirstDownload between (HRSignalTime .. HRSignalTime + 3d)
| where DownloadCount >= 5
| project HRSignalTime, FirstDownload, LastDownload, UserPrincipalName, HRSignalType, DownloadCount, Files, ScenarioId
| order by DownloadCount desc
queries.expectedUse: Find insider-risk-style sequences after HR context appears.

queries.title: Power BI Underlying Data Export Followed by Email
queries.businessQuestion: Was customer-level Power BI data exported and then emailed or shared?
queries.query:
let exports = PowerBIActivity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Operation in ('PowerBIExport','UnderlyingDataExport')
| project ExportTime=TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, ReportName, ExportFileName=FileName, ScenarioId;
let sharing = M365Activity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Operation in ('EmailSent','ExternalEmailSent','FileShared')
| project ShareTime=TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, FileName, Recipient, TargetDomain, Operation, ScenarioId;
exports
| join kind=inner sharing on UserPrincipalName
| where ShareTime between (ExportTime .. ExportTime + 6h)
| where FileName == ExportFileName or FileName has_any ('Credit','Branch','Customer','Risk','Export')
| project ExportTime, ShareTime, UserPrincipalName, ReportName, ExportFileName, Operation, Recipient, TargetDomain, ScenarioId
| order by ShareTime desc
queries.expectedUse: Correlate Power BI exports with downstream sharing behavior.

queries.title: Teams Messages Containing Sensitive Banking Patterns
queries.businessQuestion: Which Teams messages included account-like, customer-like, or collections-sensitive patterns?
queries.query:
M365Activity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Workload == 'Teams' and Operation == 'TeamsMessageSent'
| where MessageText has_any ('CUST-BNK','ACCT-FIC','COLL-FIC','HARDSHIP-FIC','TXN-FIC','SAR-DRAFT')
| extend MatchedPattern = case(MessageText has 'ACCT-FIC', 'Account-like value', MessageText has 'CUST-BNK', 'Customer ID', MessageText has 'HARDSHIP-FIC', 'Hardship note', 'Other sensitive pattern')
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, ChannelName, MessagePreview=substring(MessageText,0,160), MatchedPattern, ScenarioId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
queries.expectedUse: Support Teams DLP and Communication Compliance demonstrations.

queries.title: Forms Export with Sensitive Customer Values
queries.businessQuestion: Did a Forms export contain sensitive banking patterns or get shared externally?
queries.query:
M365Activity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Operation in ('FormCreated','FormResponseSubmitted','FormExported','FileShared','ExternalEmailSent')
| where FileName has_any ('Form','Complaint','Responses') or MessageText has_any ('CUST-BNK','ACCT-FIC','TXN-FIC')
| summarize Operations=make_set(Operation), Files=make_set(FileName), Recipients=make_set(Recipient), FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName, ScenarioId
| extend Severity = iff(set_has_element(Operations, 'ExternalEmailSent') or set_has_element(Operations, 'FileShared'), 'High', 'Medium')
| order by LastSeen desc
queries.expectedUse: Identify sensitive form response collection and risky sharing of exports.

queries.title: Synthetic Devon Risk Chain Timeline
queries.businessQuestion: What is the chronological risk timeline for Devon Reyes?
queries.query:
union isfuzzy=true M365Activity_CL, PurviewDlpEvents_CL, EndpointDlpEvents_CL, DefenderCloudAppEvents_CL, CopilotInteractionEvents_CL, IdentitySignInEvents_CL, InsiderRiskSignals_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where UserPrincipalName has 'devon.reyes' or UserPrincipalName == 'devon.reyes@contoso.example'
| where Operation in ('RiskySignIn','FileAccessed','FileDownloaded','MassDownloadActivity','CopilotInteraction','AIAppInteraction','ExternalEmailSent','DLPPolicyMatch','DLPOverride','FilePrinted','FileCopiedToNetworkShare','SensitivityLabelChanged','InsiderRiskSequence','HRSignal')
| project TimeGenerated, Workload, Operation, UserPrincipalName, FileName, SensitivityLabel, Recipient, TargetDomain, DeviceId, RiskScore, ScenarioId
| order by TimeGenerated asc
queries.expectedUse: Build an investigation timeline for the multi-day Devon risk chain.

queries.title: Top Sensitive Files by Risky Activity Count
queries.businessQuestion: Which sensitive files generated the most risky activity?
queries.query:
union isfuzzy=true M365Activity_CL, PurviewDlpEvents_CL, EndpointDlpEvents_CL, DefenderCloudAppEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where SensitivityLabel has_any ('Confidential','Highly Confidential','Regulated Financial Data','Legal Privileged','HR Restricted')
| extend RiskyOperation = Operation in ('FileDownloaded','FileShared','ExternalEmailSent','DLPPolicyMatch','DLPOverride','FilePrinted','FileCopiedToNetworkShare','FileCopiedToUSB','AIAppInteraction','UnmanagedAppUpload')
| where RiskyOperation
| summarize RiskyEventCount=count(), Users=make_set(UserPrincipalName), Operations=make_set(Operation), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by FileName, SensitivityLabel
| top 20 by RiskyEventCount desc
queries.expectedUse: Create executive-friendly sensitive data exposure dashboards.

queries.title: DLP Overrides by User and Scenario
queries.businessQuestion: Which users are overriding DLP warnings and why?
queries.query:
PurviewDlpEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Operation == 'DLPOverride'
| summarize OverrideCount=count(), Files=make_set(FileName), Justifications=make_set(OverrideJustification), Policies=make_set(PolicyName), LastOverride=max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName, ScenarioId
| extend Severity = case(OverrideCount >= 3, 'High', OverrideCount == 2, 'Medium', 'Low')
| order by OverrideCount desc, LastOverride desc
queries.expectedUse: Review user behavior and DLP override governance.

queries.title: Sensitive Label Removal or Downgrade by Devon Reyes
queries.businessQuestion: Did Devon remove or downgrade labels on sensitive files?
queries.query:
SensitivityLabelEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where UserPrincipalName has 'devon.reyes' or UserPrincipalName == 'devon.reyes@contoso.example'
| where Operation in ('SensitivityLabelChanged','SensitivityLabelRemoved','LabelDowngrade')
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, FileName, OldLabel, NewLabel, Operation, Justification, ScenarioId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
queries.expectedUse: Focus an investigation on risky label behavior by the primary risk persona.

codexUsageGuidance: Use these KQL samples as templates, not exact production queries.
Codex should generate environment-specific versions by replacing placeholder tables and fields.
If the demo telemetry is stored in Azure Data Explorer, keep the field names consistent with this file to reduce adaptation effort.
If using Microsoft Defender Advanced Hunting, map these events to native tables such as DeviceFileEvents, CloudAppEvents, EmailEvents, IdentityLogonEvents, and related tables.
If using Purview exports or Unified Audit Log, normalize Operation and Workload values before running correlation logic.
Queries that reference PromptText should only use synthetic prompt content. Do not ingest real sensitive prompts into a demo dataset.
